name: azure-clickhouse
description: Read Azure Blob Storage files into ClickHouse using table functions

auth_method.title: Authentication method
auth_method.description: Choose how to authenticate to Azure Blob Storage
x-enum-descriptions: Provide a full Azure Storage connection string.
Provide the storage account name and access key.
No credentials needed; the data is publicly accessible.

azure_storage_connection_string.title: Connection string
azure_storage_connection_string.description: Paste an Azure Storage connection string

path.title: Azure URI
path.description: Path to your Azure container and blob

errorMessage.pattern: Must be an Azure URI (e.g. azure://container/path or https://account.blob.core.windows.net/container/path)

files.name: model
files.code_template:
# Model YAML
# Reference documentation: https://docs.rilldata.com/reference/project-files/models
type: model
materialize: true
connector: clickhouse
sql: |[[ if eq .auth_method "connection_string" ]]
  SELECT * FROM azureBlobStorage(
      '[[ propVal .props "azure_storage_connection_string" ]]',
      '[[ azureContainer .path ]]',
      '[[ azureBlobPath .path ]]'
  )[[ else if eq .auth_method "account_key" ]]
  SELECT * FROM azureBlobStorage(
      '[[ azureEndpoint .path .azure_storage_account ]]',
      '[[ azureContainer .path ]]',
      '[[ azureBlobPath .path ]]',
      '[[ propVal .props "azure_storage_account" ]]',
      '[[ propVal .props "azure_storage_key" ]]'
  )[[ else ]]
  SELECT * FROM azureBlobStorage(
      '[[ azureEndpoint .path "" ]]',
      '[[ azureContainer .path ]]',
      '[[ azureBlobPath .path ]]'
  )[[ end ]]
